# F. Lee McLemore, DDS — Weatherford, TX Dentist
# https://weatherforddentistrytx.com
# Family and cosmetic dental practice serving Weatherford and Parker County, TX since 1991.

## Core Pages

https://weatherforddentistrytx.com/
Home page. General dentist in Weatherford, TX. Dr. F. Lee McLemore, DDS. New patients welcome. Phone: (817) 594-8665. Address: 610 Eureka St, Weatherford, TX 76086.

https://weatherforddentistrytx.com/contact
Contact page. Office hours Mon–Thu 8am–5pm. Phone, address, and directions for the Weatherford dental office.

https://weatherforddentistrytx.com/patient-forms
Patient forms. Download new patient paperwork before your first visit to save time.

## Services

https://weatherforddentistrytx.com/services/general-dentistry
General dentistry. Exams, cleanings, fillings, root canals, extractions, and preventive care for all ages.

https://weatherforddentistrytx.com/services/cosmetic-dentistry
Cosmetic dentistry. Teeth whitening, porcelain veneers, composite bonding, and smile makeovers.

https://weatherforddentistrytx.com/services/pediatric-dentistry
Pediatric dentistry. Gentle dental care for infants, children, and teens. First visits, sealants, fluoride treatments.

https://weatherforddentistrytx.com/services/geriatric-dentistry
Geriatric dentistry. Specialized care for older adults including dentures, implants, and dry-mouth management.

https://weatherforddentistrytx.com/services/special-needs-dentistry
Special needs dentistry. Adapted dental care for patients with physical, cognitive, or medical conditions.

## Service Areas

https://weatherforddentistrytx.com/areas/weatherford
Serving Weatherford, TX. Primary office location.

https://weatherforddentistrytx.com/areas/aledo
Serving Aledo, TX. Short drive to our Weatherford office.

https://weatherforddentistrytx.com/areas/mineral-wells
Serving Mineral Wells, TX and Palo Pinto County patients.

https://weatherforddentistrytx.com/areas/brock
Serving Brock, TX and surrounding rural Parker County communities.

https://weatherforddentistrytx.com/areas/springtown
Serving Springtown, TX and northern Parker County.

https://weatherforddentistrytx.com/areas/hudson-oaks
Serving Hudson Oaks, TX residents.

https://weatherforddentistrytx.com/areas/cresson
Serving Cresson, TX and southern Parker County patients.

https://weatherforddentistrytx.com/areas/granbury
Serving Granbury, TX and Hood County patients.

https://weatherforddentistrytx.com/areas/stephenville
Serving Stephenville, TX and Erath County patients.

Blog index. Educational dental health articles for patients in Weatherford and surrounding areas.
